descGu: Real coding language! print(), variables, maths!

teacherGuide.conceptGu: Python = world's most popular programming language. AI, web, science — everywhere. print() = screen પર show. Variable = named box to store value. + - * / = same as maths. replit.com — browser Python, no install!
teacherGuide.conceptEn: Python: print() outputs text, variables store values, arithmetic works like maths. Use replit.com — no install needed.
teacherGuide.storyGu: 'Yuval, ChatGPT = Python! Instagram = Python! YouTube recommendations = Python! print("Hello") = first step of billion-dollar apps!'
teacherGuide.scriptGu: 'Open replit.com. New Python file. Type: print("Hello Yuval!"). Click Run. SEE IT APPEAR! That is real code running!'
teacherGuide.tipsGu: 💡 replit.com — free, no login needed for basic use! Type together. Make it print his name. Make it do maths. Celebrate each output!

questions.textEn: To show text on screen in Python, you use ___?

questions.textGu: Python: print("Hello") — quotes ની અંદર text = ?
questions.textEn: In Python, text inside quotes is called a ___?

questions.hintGu: Variable = named box. age box ની અંદર 7 save!
questions.hintEn: Variable stores a value — like a named box!

questions.textEn: What does Python print for: print(3 + 4)?
questions.hintEn: Python calculates then prints the answer: 7!

questions.hintGu: Variable print = value inside! name = Yuval → prints Yuval

questions.textEn: A line starting with # in Python — the computer ___?
questions.hintEn: # marks a comment — computer skips it!

questions.textGu: Python: Yuval ની age print કરવા steps?
questions.textEn: Put Python steps in order to print Yuval's age!
questions.hintGu: First store value, then print, then run, then see!
